mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MINIMI_BASIC ( USER_ID, PRODUCT_ID, FACE_DIRECTION_CODE, X_POSITION, Y_POSITION, Z_POSITION, MAIN_YN, USE_YN, INSERT_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{productId}, #{faceDirectionCode}, #{xPosition}, #{yPosition}, #{zPosition}, #{mainYN}, #{useYN}, #{insertUserId} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE PRODUCT_ID = #productId}, FACE_DIRECTION_CODE = #{faceDirectionCode}, X_POSITION = #{xPosition}, Y_POSITION = #{yPosition}, Z_POSITION = #{zPosition}, MAIN_YN = #{mainYN}, USE_YN = #{useYN}, UPDATE_USER_ID = #{updateUserId}
